libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property is indicated. Write tests against the 2.0.0 API: RenderingContext and SkinResourceLoader are gone. Meaningful tests should obtain or prepare an injected renderer, create a minimal skin jar containing META-INF/maven/site.vm when exercising skin/template paths, and render small src/site trees rather than only testing simple POJO getters.

deterministic_setup.reason: The renderer's upstream 2.0.0 tests use Plexus/Sisu injection; Sisu's Plexus container requires Guice at test runtime.
Upstream tests use Plexus test support to obtain an injected SiteRenderer/PlexusContainer instead of constructing DefaultSiteRenderer with null injected fields.
The public skin API createContextForSkin takes Maven Artifact, but maven-artifact is declared provided by doxia-site-renderer and is not present in the normal Gradle test classpath.
The renderer discovers Doxia parser modules from component descriptors; APT is test-scoped in doxia-site-renderer and needed for typical src/site/apt rendering coverage.
The renderer discovers Doxia parser modules from component descriptors; XDOC is test-scoped upstream and needed for typical src/site/xdoc rendering coverage.
The renderer discovers Doxia parser modules from component descriptors; FML is test-scoped upstream and used by the upstream site rendering tests.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8134 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.doxia:doxia-site-renderer:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The issue's compile failure is mainly caused by existing 1.9.1 tests using APIs removed in 2.0.0, so tests still need source updates.
Plexus/Sisu component lookup and parser discovery are exactly the areas likely to need Native Image metadata; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: doxia-site-renderer 2.0.0's meaningful paths rely on Plexus/Sisu-injected components and parser modules that are not all on the normal consumer runtime classpath.
